teacherNote: Update this file every Sunday. Keep the same structure and replace only the story content.

monday.title: Government Sample Story for Monday
monday.summary: This is placeholder news text for Government. On Sunday, replace this paragraph with a short factual summary of one real news story. Keep the writing clear, neutral, and student-friendly. Students should use the activities below to connect the story to course concepts.

vocabulary.definition: A key Government idea students can use to understand the story.
A second concept that helps explain who has power or influence.
A term connected to the people, institutions, or choices in the news.
A big-picture idea that helps students connect facts to class content.

questions.prompt: Which detail from the summary is most important for understanding the government, economic, or historical issue?
options: A person or institution made a choice
The story has no connection to class
Only opinions matter
The headline alone is enough evidence
questions.correctFeedback: Correct. Students should identify the actor, institution, or decision first.
questions.incorrectFeedback: Not quite. Start by identifying who acted and what decision or event occurred.

questions.prompt: Which course idea best fits this story?
options: Law
Executive Branch
Federal Court
Public Policy
questions.correctFeedback: Good. This term can help explain the story with course language.
questions.incorrectFeedback: Review the vocabulary terms and choose the concept most directly connected to the event.

questions.prompt: What should a strong written response include?
options: A claim, evidence from the summary, and a course concept
Only personal opinion
A copied sentence with no explanation
A question instead of an answer
questions.correctFeedback: Yes. Strong responses connect evidence to a course idea.
questions.incorrectFeedback: Try again. A strong response needs a clear answer, evidence, and course vocabulary.

written.prompt: Explain which part of government is involved and what power or responsibility it is using.

monday.exitTicket: What is one question this story raises for you about power, choices, rights, or change?
